channel.title: Longevity on Joe Muller's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Longevity on Joe Muller's Blog

item.title: Blueprint Protocol
item.description:
• Website: https://bento.me/blueprint
  • App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/blueprint-protocol/id6467042093
  • Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.cotr.blueprint
  • Status: Live
  • Stack:
    • Flutter
    • CSV

Bryan Johnson’s longevity protocol is quickly becoming popular among the health-conscious. Blueprint Protocol is a Flutter app that presents the entire protocol (supplements, recipes, exercises, products, and routine) in a simple interface. It is completely offline and free of ads.
